# Extração: 2.9

- **Fonte:** 2.9.pdf
- **Tipo:** PDF

---

My biggest most aggressive scaling was going from $850k/yr to $8.5M then $26.5M via
Facebook ads for a Print on Demand (POD) Ecom store.
It's very difficult to replicate, because many things came together. I want you to think about
what that looks like for you:
1. A product matched to a passionate, constantly refreshing audience (parents and
grandparents)
2. An existing product (personalised kids books) with a unique twist
3. LOTS of testing with friends and family to understand what they liked/disliked/didn't
understand so we could keep improving it
4. LOTS of ads/audiences/angles/messaging testing before we got it right. The most
successful campaign honed in on the experience and feeling, rather than the functional or
unique parts of the book
5. We were able to go global FAST with Facebook ads and launching new POD suppliers -
we tested countries using FB ads first before setting up supplier (and shipped from the UK or
cancelled if we couldn't)
6. I worked hard on the landing page and user flows before we hired in a CRO specialist to
just focus on conversion rates. Don't discount the impact on your FB ads performance
7. At peak, I had FOUR creatives in my team pumping out new angles and ideas for ads
(visual and copy)
8. I had a dedicated Business Intelligence/Data person crunching numbers - scaling to
8-figures needs tweaking of the finer details and margins.
9. Getting to 7-figures is easy when you have a tested/proven product, clear view of your
market and creatives/targeting tested and dialled in
10. Place customer service front and centre. Whilst refund rates hovered between 1-3% for
various reasons, our Net Promoter Score (how well our customers rated us post purchase)
was the highest I've ever seen at 80-85 (scale of -100 to +100). It's because the customer
ALWAYS came first no matter what it was, but also the entire buying experience was
enveloped in the brand (fun, curious, quirky, surprising). How does your experience come
across?
11. You can read more on this here
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
